speaker: speaker1
text: Hit ' em high , hit ' em low . Class of ' 93 — let's go !

speaker: speaker2
text: Hi there , everyone . We hope you're having a good night !

speaker: speaker1
text: Wasn't that football game great ! I just knew we'd win !

speaker: speaker2
text: The night is young , folks . Get some food and mingle with those faces from yesterday .

speaker: speaker1
text: Later we'll let you know who the King and Queen of the Reunion will be .

speaker: speaker2
text: But for now , the band is playing the songs from our senior year . Get out on that dance floor !
